situations: A customer asks where to find rice, lentils, or fish.
A passenger asks which bus goes to the hospital.
A patient is describing symptoms for themselves or their child.
A parent asks what homework their child missed while absent.
A customer asks for medicine for a headache or fever.
A worker asks what time their shift starts.
A tenant asks about the rent amount and when it is due.
A customer asks how to open a bank account.
Someone asks where the nearest mosque is.
A customer orders food and asks if it is halal.
A caller reports a fire in their building and needs help.
Someone reports that their bag or wallet was stolen.
A patient arrives with chest pain and needs to be checked in.
A family arrives at a shelter after fleeing a dangerous situation.
